title: lotodes lupinellus
intro: Lotodes lupinellus, also known as the lotus-trefoil, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Lotodes lupinellus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids in its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of consuming Lotodes lupinellus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of Lotodes lupinellus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
